🔑 GCLID Persistence Gap

Demos happen on return visits. Store GCLID in a 90-day cookie on first landing to recover attribution.

⚡ Execution Playbook

Prioritised actions with copy-paste execution. Check off items as you complete them — progress is saved in your browser.

P1

Exclude Negative Keywords

Competitor & irrelevant search terms wasting budget. Export CSV → Google Ads → Tools → Bulk Actions → Upload.

Campaign-level = per campaign
Account-level = blocks all campaigns
CSV format:   Campaign  |  Ad Group  |  Account keyword type  |  Keyword  |  Criterion Type
AI Agents - General  1 irrelevant
AgentProduct Enrichment  1 irrelevant
Copy list (text) 2 unique terms · exact match
P2

Campaign Actions

Sorted by urgency — pause zero-conversion campaigns first to stop budget bleed.

Campaign / Use CaseActionReasonSpendConv.
BrandBoost.space
Boost.space
 Pause 0 conversions on €25 spend — stop budget bleed €25 0
Competitor Alternatives
Pause 0 conversions on €14 spend — stop budget bleed €14 0

Rebuild Only 1 conv at €273 CPA — restructure ad groups €273 1
AgentDynamic Pricing

 Rebuild Only 4 conv at €58 CPA — restructure ad groups €232 4

Audience Activation
 Rebuild Only 2 conv at €57 CPA — restructure ad groups €114 2
Technology - MCP

GEO Optimization

Product Enrichment
 Scale 9 conversions at €38 CPA — increase daily budget €342 9
AgentSupplier Product Listing Agent
Supplier Product Listing Agent
 Scale 8 conversions at €30 CPA — increase daily budget €240 8
P3

Structural & Tracking Fixes

One-time fixes that unlock compounding improvements — start with Critical items.

Fix GCLID 90-day cookie Critical

Store gclid URL param in a 90-day cookie on first landing. Read cookie value on all pageviews to recover cross-session attribution. Without this, demos & leads on return visits show 0 paid attribution.

Fix UTM ValueTrack: {campaign} → {campaignname} Critical

All campaign Final URLs use the invalid {campaign} parameter — replace with {campaignname}. Current state: all Google Ads sessions land with utm_campaign=(none) in PostHog.

Add demo_meeting_booked as Google Ads conversion action High

Import the PostHog demo_meeting_booked event (via GCLID matching) as a conversion action. Currently Google Ads optimises on micro-conversions only, not actual demos.

Switch converting ad groups to Target CPA bidding High

Ad groups with 5+ conversions in 90 days are eligible for Smart Bidding. Start with tCPA = current average × 1.2 to give the algorithm room to learn.

Create shared negative keyword list for all campaigns High

Apply the negatives from the P1 list above as a shared list across all campaigns. This prevents the same irrelevant terms from appearing again after Google expands match types.

Add RLSA audiences to all Search campaigns Medium

Layer in website visitors (30-day) and demo-form visitors (90-day) as Observation audiences. Use bid adjustments: +30% for demo visitors, +15% for general website visitors.

Audit ad assets: add sitelinks, callouts, structured snippets Medium

All campaigns are missing key ad extensions. Add at minimum: 4 sitelinks per campaign (Pricing, Demo, Case Studies, [Use Case]), 4 callouts, structured snippets for product features.

P4

Add Targeted Keywords

Converting search terms (6) not yet in your keyword lists — add as Exact or Phrase match to capture them explicitly.

Exact = 2+ conversions
Phrase = 1 conversion
CSV format:   Campaign  |  Ad Group  |  Keyword  |  Criterion Type
